description: The UserInterfacePositioner component causes the slot to which it is attached to track the user's position and rotation (optionally head). This is a somewhat nicer and cleaner alternative than parenting a slot directly to a user's avatar node.

fields.UseHead: Whether to track to the user's head.
fields.RotateVerticalOnly: Whether to act like the freeform dash or not.
fields.PositionSpeed: The speed at which the object will track the user's position.
fields.RotationSpeed: The speed at which the object will track the user's rotation.
fields.ActivationDistance: The distance from the user to the object at which the object will start tracking the user's position and rotation. Zero means "always track".
fields.ActivationAngle: The angle between the user and the object at which the object will start tracking the user's position and rotation. Zero means "always track".
fields.DeactivationDistance: How far away the user has to be from the component for it to to stop following.
fields.DeactivationAngle: How much of an angle deviation it has to be for it to stop following.
fields.TargetPosition: The target position this UI is lerping to.
fields.TargetRotation: The target rotation this UI is lerping to.
fields._position: The field to drive to set the position of this UI.
fields._rotation: The field to drive to set the rotation of this UI.
